title: baphia spathacea subsp. polyantha
intro: Baphia spathacea subsp. polyantha, also known as the 'polyanthy Baphia', is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Baphia spathacea subsp. polyantha include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to help alleviate symptoms of fever and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
